text: This study will give a more comprehensive understanding of current practices of leadership in the Armed Forces that were surveyed in this study. The aim of this study is to descriptively determine the motivating military leadership, military environment, characteristics of military leaders and military leadership benefits in the Armed Forces of Bosnia and Herzegovina. Methodology used in this research is a survey on a sample of 200 soldiers from the Armed Forces of Bosnia and Herzegovina, and the descriptive analysis of the survey data. Based on the results of the descriptive analysis of the data, the survey questions have been highly agreed by the respondents of this research. The findings of this study have been as expected. The answers given by the respondents in this research are in general consistent and are in line with the military leadership benefits and characteristics of military leaders. This study found that there is a positive motivating military leadership. The military environment is also found to be positive. In general, simple missions, and an environment with regular activities were determined. This is due to the fact that military environment is full of routine works. In general, task, team and organization oriented leadership, and shared leadership was determined.
explanation: The passage is very generic and repetitive, with few concrete results or methodological details. This pattern is common in AI-generated text or translations, though a human-authored draft is also possible.
